\tzpentry{ID11385}{Friedmann Breathing Component Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The breathing model augments the Friedmann equation with curvature and a dynamic pressure function F(a).
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
H^{2}(a)=H_{0}^{2}\left[\Omega_{r}a^{-4}+\Omega_{m}a^{-3}+\Omega_{K}a^{-2}+\Omega_{X}F(a)\right]
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{fa1731b4-432a-5fdb-b102-51e5c8daa92a}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-11385-portal-breathing}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.gen-ph}.
